purpose: Baseline 'too large to run' demonstration (ex05 section 5.2) — a genuinely oversized model against this machine's real ~7.65GB RAM.
prompt: Explain in one short sentence what virtual memory is.
error:
llama-server process has terminated: exit status 1: ggml_backend_cpu_buffer_type_alloc_buffer: failed to allocate buffer of size 19192545280
alloc_tensor_range: failed to allocate CPU buffer of size 19192545280

analysis: Failure occurred in ~6 seconds, before any Prefill/Decode computation began — this is a hard memory-allocation failure (memory-bound), not a compute-bound slowdown. Directly answers PRD.md research question #1.
